text.title: Microservices Observability Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema describing one service's observability checklist artefact.

section.title: Schema

example.note: service_name PascalCase; logs not structured; no RED metrics; B3 propagator (interop only); no trace_id in logs; OTLP endpoint not a URI; PII in spans.

forbidden.pattern: Span attribute named `user.email` / `customer.phone` etc. carrying raw PII.
